steps.title: Set up the substitution
steps.content:
We need to find $f(34)$ where $f(x) = 180(x - 2)$ calculates the sum of interior angles for an $x$-sided polygon. Substitute $x = 34$:
$$f(34) = 180(34 - 2)$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Simplify inside the parentheses and multiply:
$$f(34) = 180(32) = 5760$$
The sum of the interior angles for a 34-sided polygon is 5760 degrees.
